title: cymbopogon foliosus
intro: Cymbopogon foliosus, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon foliosus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Cymbopogon foliosus can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
